ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle model was produced */,
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of the vehicle */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "fuel_consumption_city" REAL /* Fuel consumption in city driving conditions (L/100 km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_hwy" REAL /* Fuel consumption in highway driving conditions (L/100 km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_comb_l_per_100" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption (L/100 km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_comb_mpg" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption (mpg) */,
  "co2_emissions_g_per_km" INTEGER /* CO2 emissions (g/km) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the vehicle data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production for the vehicle model */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production for the vehicle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_class_id") REFERENCES vehicle_classes ("vehicle_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make */,
  "make_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle make */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the make is from */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the make was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the make's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation of the model */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the model */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Drivetrain type of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "vehicle_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class */,
  "vehicle_class_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle class */,
  "average_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Average fuel consumption for the vehicle class */,
  "average_co2_emissions" INTEGER /* Average CO2 emissions for the vehicle class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  "transmission_description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "gear_count" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the transmission (e.g., manual, automatic, CVT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "octane_rating" INTEGER /* Octane rating of the fuel */,
  "cost_per_liter" REAL /* Cost per liter of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_consumption_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical fuel consumption record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "fuel_consumption_city" REAL /* Fuel consumption in city driving conditions (L/100 km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_hwy" REAL /* Fuel consumption in highway driving conditions (L/100 km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_comb_l_per_100" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption (L/100 km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_comb_mpg" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption (mpg) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to measure fuel consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumption_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co2_emissions_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical CO2 emissions record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "co2_emissions_g_per_km" INTEGER /* CO2 emissions (g/km) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to measure CO2 emissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co2_emissions_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the record belongs to */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regulation */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Detailed test results for compliance */,
  "certification_number" TEXT /* Certification number issued by the regulatory body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "regulation_description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the regulation */,
  "revised_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation was last revised */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Body that issued the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has verified their purchase */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of vehicles sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale occurred */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code used during the sale */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of return if the vehicle was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturing_data" (
  "manufacturing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle manufactured */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacturing */,
  "production_facility" TEXT /* Facility where the vehicle was produced */,
  "assembly_line" TEXT /* Assembly line where the vehicle was assembled */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the manufacturing process */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last quality inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
